visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a lime green sweatshirt and distressed dark jeans stands in an office hallway next to a woman in a dark jumpsuit. He has a shocked expression, mouth wide open, and begins to move his arms frantically. The hallway has wood-paneled walls and neutral-colored flooring. (2) The man runs through several rooms. These rooms appear to be in the middle of a move, with numerous cardboard boxes, white bags filled with items, and various pieces of equipment scattered on the floor. He gestures wildly at the clutter and the empty shelves, his face contorted in exaggerated surprise. (3) He continues his frantic run through a long white corridor and into a large, nearly empty room with pale wood floors. He encounters a woman wearing a tan mask and a pink top. He runs past her, looking around the spacious, vacated area with his arms outstretched. (4) In a final sequence, he enters a completely empty, brightly lit room with a single air conditioning unit on the wall. He looks around in despair, eventually leaning against the white wall and sliding down slightly while continuing his exaggerated yelling and crying gestures.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 woman in jumpsuit, 1 person in blue hoodie, 1 woman in mask, and 1 person in the background hallway.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man with light brown hair, wearing a lime green long-sleeved sweatshirt with text and oversized, distressed dark grey jeans with multiple pockets and white/black sneakers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern office environment undergoing a move. Some rooms are cluttered with boxes, bags, and shelving units, while others are completely empty with white walls and light wood floors. There are glass doors and partitions visible throughout.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A loud, high-pitched male vocalization begins immediately, characterized by a sudden burst of energy and high arousal. The sound is captured in a reverberant indoor space, creating a noticeable echo. No background music is present, leaving the vocal as the primary signal. (2) Rapid, rhythmic percussive sounds from footsteps are heard as the male voice continues to shout in Mandarin with a comedic, strained quality. The speech rate is fast and irregular, punctuated by sharp inhalations and high-pitched wails that suggest a mock-distressed tone. (3) The sound of a door opening with a metallic click is followed by continued loud vocalizations. The acoustics shift slightly as the person moves between different rooms, but the high-energy shouting remains constant. Distant, low-volume laughter from others is briefly audible in the background. (4) The recording concludes with a series of long, drawn-out wailing sounds. The vocal tension is high, and the intensity remains elevated. The incidental noise of clothes rustling and feet shuffling is minimal compared to the dominant, loud vocal performance which ends with a fading cry.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic sketch intended to humorously portray a content creator's exaggerated reaction to finding his office space completely cleared out or moved. The narrative relies on high-arousal physical comedy and vocal distress to entertain viewers.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high energy and repetitive shouting create a frantic pace typical of comedic short-form social media content.
